tests.description: graph: path to graph (can be relative), repetitions: number of repetitions for test, algorithms: algorithms that are being tested

algorithms.description: genetic_algorithm, wymaga parametry : executionTime, populationSize, parentSize, offspringSize, mutationRate, crossoverRate, tournamentSize, iterationsWithNoImprovement, acceptanceLevel, opt
algorithms.name: genetic_algorithm

algorithms.description: DFS, requires : findUpperBound - computed earlier using NN, maxMemoryUsageMB - stops the algorithm when exceeded, maxRunningTime, repetetive and ties - params for using NN
algorithms.name: depth_first_search

algorithms.description: BFS, requires : findUpperBound - computed earlier using NN, maxMemoryUsageMB - stops the algorithm when exceeded, maxRunningTime, repetetive and ties - params for using NN
algorithms.name: breath_first_search

algorithms.description: LC, requires : findUpperBound - computed earlier using NN, maxMemoryUsageMB - stops the algorithm when exceeded, maxRunningTime, repetetive and ties - params for using NN
algorithms.name: lowest_cost_search

algorithms.description: nearestNeighbour, requires : startVertex - wierzcholek rozpoczecia algorytmu, repetetive : should it be RNN
algorithms.name: nearestNeighbour

algorithms.description: tabu_search, requires : executionTime, cadentionTime, findUB, acceptanceLevel and opt - params used for testing relative error, iterationsWithNoImprovement - one o the stop criteria
algorithms.name: tabu_search

algorithms.description: tabu_search complex, requires : executionTime, cadentionTime, findUB, tabuListSize, iterationsToChangeSize - size changes with number of iterations without improving UB
algorithms.name: tabu_search_complex
